title: Photo Detail View and Sharing
description: Build the dedicated photo detail page showing full-size image with all metadata, AI insights, comments, and engagement features. Display EXIF data in organized panel (camera, settings, location if not stripped). Show AI-generated tags and feedback. Include social sharing buttons (copy link, share to Twitter/Facebook). Implement image zoom/lightbox for viewing details. Add previous/next navigation when coming from feed or profile context. Create OpenGraph meta tags for rich link previews when shared. Out of scope: image download, print ordering.
